Welcome to the $OMNI Genesis Airdrop

Verify Wallet
Backed by the best
001

Ethereum's Integrated Rollup Layer

Omni is a blockchain purpose-built to connect all rollups securely through the use of restaking.

Unification
Rollup Integration
The biggest existential threat facing Ethereum is the fragmentation caused by rollups. As rollups continue to gain adoption, Ethereum’s users and their capital are increasingly split into siloed ecosystems, degrading the global network effects. Omni fixes this by integrating all rollups into a cohesive, interoperable network.
L2
Isolated Roll-ups
L1
Communication Layer
Performance
Security at Scale
Omni uses restaking to establish a new type of high performance blockchain. Leveraging security from Ethereum in combination with a chain architecture optimized for speed empowers the network to serve as the integration infrastructure for the entire rollup ecosystem.
L2
UNIFIED Roll-ups
L1
Communication Layer
L2
Isolated Rollups
L1
Settlement Layer
L2
UNIFIED Rollups
L1
Settlement Layer
002

Developers

Omni enables developers to program global applications that span Ethereum’s entire rollup ecosystem.

$OMNI Genesis

Asset issuers can upgrade their tokens to benefit from global liquidity and adoption, verify your wallet.

Verify Wallet
Expand

Existing applications can expand past a single rollup’s users and liquidity without upgrading the deployed smart contracts.

Expand
Innovate

Omni unlocks a new design space for developers, empowering them to build global apps across all rollups that benefit from fundamental economic advantages.

Innovate
